executives.name: Louise Grondin
executives.background: Ms. Grondin has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, specializing in environment and sustainability, notably at Agnico Eagle.

executives.name: Ronnie Beevor
executives.background: Ronnie Beevor is an experienced investment banker and mining executive. He was previously Head of Investment Banking at NM Rothschild & Sons (Australia) and has served on the boards of numerous mining companies.
